title: Destiny's Kitchen Sink
description: This modpack is a random assortment of fun mods for exploration and building
body:
A custom, optimized modpack made just for me and my friends. There's no theme, no grand vision—just a bunch of random mods we thought were fun. Everything runs smoothly, even if nothing makes sense.

It's built for the weird moments, the unexpected laughs, and the “how did that even happen?” kind of nights. Whether you're building, exploring, or just messing around, this pack keeps the chaos running without your FPS crashing with it.

Highlights:

Carefully unplanned, but performance-tuned

Packed with surprises and strange combinations

Perfect for multiplayer sessions with friends

No rules, no structure—just good times

If it works, it works. If it doesn’t, that’s probably part of the fun.
